name: Move-Out Deposit Disposition
description: Maintenance coordinates move-out closeout and inspection evidence, Accounting prepares the deposit disposition package, and humans approve any money or release step before handoff to make-ready.

stages.name: Move-Out Facts
stages.description: Normalize Lane 0 move-out trigger facts and identify missing inputs.

steps.title: Normalize move-out facts
steps.instructions: Normalize lease, unit, property, tenant, move_out_date, occupancy, delinquent/open balance, completion, key return, inspection evidence, and conflict-check inputs from the trigger candidate. Do not contact residents or write to AppFolio.
steps.dispatch_body: Normalize move-out trigger facts and surface missing fields or conflicts. No external sends and no AppFolio writes.

steps.title: Confirm closeout prerequisites
steps.instructions: Confirm move-out completion, key return state, utility closeout state, forwarding/contact availability, and unresolved occupancy or possession conflicts. Do not contact residents or write to AppFolio.
steps.dispatch_body: Confirm resident, key, utility, possession, and conflict states for move-out closeout. No external sends and no AppFolio writes.

stages.name: Inspection Evidence
stages.description: Assemble inspection evidence and review chargeable-condition support.

steps.title: Assemble inspection evidence
steps.instructions: Assemble move-out inspection photos, condition notes, work order references, key/utility evidence, and pre-existing condition caveats for deposit review. Do not contact vendors or residents.
steps.dispatch_body: Assemble evidence package for deposit deductions and make-ready planning. No external sends.

steps.title: Review inspection evidence
steps.instructions: Review inspection evidence for completeness, fair wear-and-tear boundaries, and missing documentation before Accounting prepares deductions.
steps.human_prompt: Review move-out evidence before deposit deductions are drafted.

stages.name: Deposit Disposition
stages.description: Prepare the deposit ledger, deduction support, and disposition summary without posting money movement.

steps.title: Prepare deposit ledger
steps.instructions: Prepare deposit ledger inputs from security deposit held, open balances, prorations, unpaid rent, utilities, fees, and evidence-backed charges. Produce a proposed ledger only; do not post ledger entries or write to AppFolio.
steps.dispatch_body: Prepare proposed security deposit ledger and open-balance summary. No ledger posting and no AppFolio writes.

steps.title: Draft deduction support
steps.instructions: Draft itemized deduction support tying each proposed charge to inspection evidence, lease/account facts, and conflict notes. Flag unsupported or approval-sensitive charges.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft itemized deduction support from approved evidence and ledger facts. No external sends.

stages.name: Approval And Action Package
stages.description: Human approval gates money and release decisions before Accounting prepares the final action package.

steps.title: Approve deposit disposition and release
steps.instructions: Approve refund, balance due, release language, and any charge-off/escalation path before money movement, external notice, or ledger posting occurs.
steps.human_prompt: Approval required before any deposit refund, balance due notice, release, charge-off, or ledger posting.

steps.title: Prepare approved refund or balance action package
steps.instructions: Prepare the approved refund or balance-due action package, including final ledger summary, approval evidence, and release notes. Do not send notices, initiate payments, or write to AppFolio.
steps.dispatch_body: Prepare approved refund/balance action package for human execution. No external sends, payments, or AppFolio writes.

stages.name: Turnover Handoff
stages.description: Hand off make-ready facts to the existing turnover-make-ready workflow.

steps.title: Prepare make-ready handoff
steps.instructions: Prepare make-ready handoff facts for turnover-make-ready, including unit, property, move-out date, possession status, inspection findings, chargeable damage notes, open blockers, and target ready caveats.
steps.dispatch_body: Prepare handoff package for turnover-make-ready using approved move-out and inspection facts.

steps.title: Queue turnover make-ready handoff
steps.instructions: Create the internal system handoff payload for the existing turnover-make-ready template using subject_type unit_turn when the downstream run is created. This is an internal workflow handoff only; do not deploy, merge, contact anyone, or run live AppFolio.
steps.dispatch_body: Prepare internal workflow handoff to turnover-make-ready. No external sends and no AppFolio writes.
